translations.nuance: A harsh, industrial Hegemony capital. Maintained phonetic Katakana, but for Map images, we will render Chicomoztoc as a faded drop-shadow behind the Japanese text for a sci-fi aesthetic.
Kept as phonetic, but for dialogue referencing 'Pathers', we will use 'パスの狂信者' (Fanatics of the Path) to convey their terrifying zealotry.
In-application, AI is highly illegal and feared. We will ensure dialogue referencing them sounds adequately terrifying and taboo (e.g., using '禁忌のAI' in descriptive lore).
Instead of a generic '戦う' (Fight), '交戦開始' (Commence Engagement) sounds more like a proper tactical fleet command.
Extremely flavorful and emotional AI from Secrets of the Frontier. Her dialogue will use specific emotive speech patterns unlike standard robotic AI cores.
